candidate_screening.reason_for_calling: Screen candidate for Node.js developer role.
candidate_screening.conversation_text: Agent: Hi Abhishek, calling regarding your application for Node.js Developer. Do you have experience with Microservices? User: Yes, I have worked on Express and Docker for 3 years. Agent: What is your notice period? User: Immediate. Agent: Perfect, we will schedule the technical round.

templates.title: Interview Invitation
templates.description: Email to schedule technical interview round
templates.subject: Interview Invitation - {{company_name:"Ondial Tech"}} Node.js Developer Role

interview_scheduling_follow_up.reason_for_calling: Follow up on scheduled interview status.
interview_scheduling_follow_up.conversation_text: Agent: Hi Ritu, confirming your interview tomorrow at 11 AM with the Engineering Lead. User: Yes, I have received the invite and will join. Agent: Great, best of luck.

offer_rollout_follow_up.reason_for_calling: Follow up on offer letter acceptance.
offer_rollout_follow_up.conversation_text: Agent: Hi Vicky, did you review the offer letter we sent yesterday? User: Yes, I am happy with the terms. I will sign and send it by today evening. Agent: Excellent, looking forward to you joining us on 1st July.

templates.title: Offer Letter Follow-up
templates.description: Follow-up on offer status and next steps
templates.subject: Follow-up: Job Offer from {{company_name:"Ondial HR"}}

employee_satisfaction_surveys.reason_for_calling: Collect feedback on new work-from-home policy.
employee_satisfaction_surveys.conversation_text: Agent: Hi John, how is the hybrid working policy working out for you? User: It's good, saves a lot of commute time. But collaboration is slightly harder. Agent: Thank you for your feedback.

exit_interviews.reason_for_calling: Conduct exit survey to understand reasons for leaving.
exit_interviews.conversation_text: Agent: Hi Simran, as part of your exit process, what is the main reason for your resignation? User: I got an opportunity closer to my hometown. Agent: I see. How would you rate your experience with us? User: It was good, very supportive team.

items.name: Better Opportunity
items.description: Left for a job closer to hometown.

hr_policy_compliance_updates.reason_for_calling: Reminder to sign the annual code of conduct document.
hr_policy_compliance_updates.conversation_text: Agent: Hi Tina, this is a reminder to sign the Code of Conduct document on the HR portal by Friday. User: Oh, I forgot. I will do it right now. Agent: Thank you, appreciate it.
